since_last: 39% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.23%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.67% · BTC -2.23% · Gold -1.72% · Nasdaq100 -0.35%. 39% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.23%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.23%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -2.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +10.30%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +10.30%, ANET +5.46%, BIDU +5.05%, AVGO +4.33%, CEVA +3.39%. Laggards: PANW -4.54%, PLTR -4.18%, UPST -4.01%, WDAY -3.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.94% at $150.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
